narrative: The project has moved beyond setup. AI-touched work exists in the repo and is being held behind explicit approval gates, but evidence linkage and clearance still determine whether the change is truly validated.

signals.title: AI work is landing as durable artifacts
signals.detail: 1 of 1 AI-touched outputs have been written back into the repo instead of being left in chat.

signals.title: Human control remains explicit
signals.detail: 1 approval gate(s) are still open, so important work is visible and governed.

signals.title: Evidence coverage is the next pressure point
signals.detail: Outputs exist, but the evidence rail still needs stronger linking before the dashboard can claim validated movement.
